title: senecio lanigerus
intro: Senecio lanigerus, also known as Woolly Groundsel or Velvet Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its soft, woolly leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio lanigerus include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and flu. Senecio lanigerus is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture, which is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
